/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/clang --target=aarch64-none-linux-android24 --sysroot=/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/sysroot -g -DANDROID -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -funwind-tables -fstack-protector-strong -no-canonical-prefixes -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Werror=format-security  -pthread -O3 -DNDEBUG  -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--build-id=sha1 -Wl,--no-rosegment -Wl,--no-undefined-version -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--no-undefined -Qunused-arguments   -Wl,--gc-sections  CMakeFiles/webp_quality.dir/extras/webp_quality.c.o CMakeFiles/webp_quality.dir/extras/extras.c.o CMakeFiles/webp_quality.dir/extras/quality_estimate.c.o -o webp_quality  libexampleutil.so libimagedec.so libimageioutil.so libwebpdemux.so libwebp.so -pthread libcpufeatures-libwebp.a -ldl -latomic -lm
